meta.title: Charaka-Inspired Ayurvedic Rules Engine
meta.description: Panini-style rule-based consult logic for AyurTime AI Coach

advice.summary: Kapha aggravation with obesity tendency detected. Reduce excessive sleep and day naps; introduce light daily exercise (like brisk walking) and regulated meals. Favor warm, light foods and avoid cold, heavy, oily items.
lifestyle_changes: Wake before sunrise (Brahma Muhurta)
Avoid day sleep completely
Practice moderate exercise daily (until light sweat)
Eat warm, freshly cooked meals
Include spices: ginger, black pepper, turmeric

advice.summary: Vata imbalance detected. Focus on routine, warmth, and grounding practices. Favor warm, cooked, oily foods. Practice calming pranayama and abhyanga (oil massage).
lifestyle_changes: Maintain regular meal and sleep timings
Daily abhyanga with warm sesame oil
Avoid cold, dry, raw foods
Practice Nadi Shodhana pranayama
Drink warm herbal teas (ginger, fennel)

advice.summary: Pitta excess detected. Favor cooling, calming practices and foods. Avoid spicy, oily, salty, and fermented items. Practice mindfulness and stress reduction.
lifestyle_changes: Eat cooling foods (cucumber, coconut water, mint)
Avoid excessive heat and sun exposure
Practice Shitali or Sheetkari pranayama
Reduce spicy, salty, sour foods
Apply cooling oils (coconut, sandalwood) to head and body

advice.summary: Weak digestive fire (Agni Mandya) detected. Strengthen agni with warm spices, regular meal timing, and light, easily digestible foods. Avoid overeating and late meals.
lifestyle_changes: Eat only when hungry
Include ginger, cumin, fennel in meals
Drink warm water throughout the day
Avoid cold drinks and ice
Practice mindful eating without distractions

advice.summary: Mental stress and anxiety detected (Vata-Pitta imbalance in Manas). Practice grounding meditation, pranayama, and Ayurvedic relaxation techniques. Favor calming herbs like Brahmi and Ashwagandha.
lifestyle_changes: Daily meditation (10-20 minutes)
Pranayama: Nadi Shodhana or Bhramari
Abhyanga with Brahmi oil before sleep
Avoid excessive screen time
Herbal support: Brahmi, Ashwagandha, Jatamansi tea

advice.summary: Sleep disturbance detected (Vata imbalance). Establish regular sleep routine, practice evening relaxation, warm oil massage, and avoid stimulating activities before bed.
lifestyle_changes: Sleep by 10 PM and wake before sunrise
Warm milk with nutmeg before bed
Abhyanga with sesame oil in evening
Avoid screens 1 hour before sleep
Practice Yoga Nidra or body scan meditation
